scope: MM-07 exposes the donor memory access modules through runtime/src/memory/index.ts and migrates the in-scope tool/service code paths to consume recall, scan, freshness, path, detection, filtering, @memory mention, project-memory selector, and instruction-memory loader APIs there.

requiredBehaviors: Recall, scan, manifest, age, freshness, path, detection, and branded instruction-memory loader APIs are exported from the public memory access surface.

Runtime tool and code callers import memory access helpers from runtime/src/memory/index.ts instead of donor-shaped memory leaf modules, except memory-internal legacy team prompt files allowlisted in the wiring contract.
The public recall wrapper preserves recent-tool prompt context and already-surfaced memory filtering.
Relevant-memory headers keep stable age text at attachment creation time.
edgeCases: Memory scans can be called by services without an AbortSignal.
AGENC.md frontmatter path globs are preserved when loaded through the public surface.
MEMORY.md entrypoints are excluded from scan manifests.
Stale memory headers include the drift warning before the memory path.
